abilities.name: Fiery Presence
abilities.text: When this model activates, models within (1)3" gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Flameborn
abilities.text: When this model would suffer damage from a Burning token, it instead heals that amount.

abilities.name: Heatstroke
abilities.text: When this model resolves a Burning token, damage from that token is dealt to enemy models within (1)3" instead of base contact (ignoring any additional (1) distance granted by the fervor bar).

actions.name: Huge Flaming Fist
actions.effects: Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Feed the Flames
triggers.text: This model gains a Burning token.

actions.name: Fiery Creation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. This model deals 3 irreducible damage to itself.
actions.effects: Summon a Fire Gamin in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Flashfire
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)3" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Fire Whirl
triggers.text: Enemy models that failed the duel are moved up to 3" toward the target.
